# STRAT.056 ? Theory of Constraints (Goldratt)

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** strategic_frameworks
**Subcategory:** systems_thinking_applied
**Domain:** SYSTEMS_THINKING_APPLIED
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
System limited by bottleneck; identify constraint; exploit; subordinate; elevate; repeat; throughput focus; local vs global optimization

## Application
Find the constraint; maximize its output; align everything to it; increase capacity; don't stop improving; avoid local optimization

## Key Values
- Constraint focus
- System optimization
- Throughput
- Continuous identification
- Global view

## Tags
philosophy, strategic-framework, systems_thinking_applied

Strategic framework ingested into philosophy library per operator mapping rule.
